sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ السُّيَّاحِ التَّنَقُّلَ بِالْقِطَارِ السَّرِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi turisti preferiraju putovanje brzim vozom.
sentences.translationEn: Many tourists prefer traveling by high-speed train.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ تَذْكِرَةً مِنَ الْمَحَطَّةِ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْعَاصِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam kartu na stanici za odlazak u glavni grad.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a ticket from the station to go to the capital.

sentences.arabic: الرِّحْلَةُ بِالْقِطَارِ مُرِيحَةٌ وَتَسْمَحُ لِي بِمُشَاهَدَةِ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje vozom je udobno i omogućava mi da posmatram prirodu.
sentences.translationEn: The train journey is comfortable and allows me to see nature.

sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ الْقِطَارُ فِي مَوْعِدِهِ تَمَامًا دُونَ تَأْخِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Voz stiže tačno na vrijeme bez kašnjenja.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrives exactly on time without delay.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ هِيَ الطَّرِيقَةُ الْأَفْضَلُ لِلسَّفَرِ بَيْنَ الْمُدُنِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo je najbolji način za putovanje između gradova.
sentences.translationEn: This is the best way to travel between cities.
